## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`npm test`)
- [ ] `npm run build` green across workspaces
- [ ] DB change? migration committed + backward compatible
- [ ] Security: authz checks, input validation, no secrets logged
- [ ] Audit logging for state-changing actions
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/ / OpenAPI)
- [ ] Backward compatible (no breaking API changes without version bump)
